programme.title: E83
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Craig Smart in Perth.

programme.title: E65
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: E9 - Narco Islands
programme.desc: From South America to the Solomon Islands, Foreign Correspondent reveals the tactics used by cartels to send eye-watering quantities of drugs across the Pacific. We go on the hunt for the 'narco subs' used by drug lords.

programme.title: E65
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: E84
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

Meet A Sexy Milf In A Bikini
Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Gym Day
programme.desc: Today at the pet gym Cassie, the lazy Labrador, goes swimming, and will Fudge, the fat cat, ever get up? Down in the wild woods, the Junior Vets meet even bigger cats – the Eurasian lynx, Europe's third-largest predator!

programme.title: From Zero to Hero
programme.desc: What's the most powerful number in the universe? One million? One billion? One trillion? No, it's zero! In this episode we explain why by focusing on the role of zero as a placeholder for large numbers.

programme.title: Save the Sandbank
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts restore an eroded riverbank by using a trebuchet to transport sand.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Trip to Tahiti
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo have a presentation to prepare for school, and they are scratching their heads to find the most original way to do this. Our friends travel to Tahiti, where they meet with Amana and learn more about telling a story through dance.

programme.title: Trip to Mali
programme.desc: Milo is trying to learn his poem but is having a hard time remembering the words. Alim thinks it is easier to learn something while listening to music! Zoe and Milo do not seem convinced, and Alim decides that only a short break to Mali could change this.

programme.title: Bernoulli and Company
programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.title: The Wobbly Way Home
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts use balancing skills and teamwork when they have to take a shortcut home before it gets dark.

programme.title: Ghost Hunting
programme.desc: When Mundi is startled by Fico's prank, she insists she isn't afraid of ghosts. They don't even exist! Oto and Anabella definitely believe in ghosts. Mundi vows to prove they don't, with a trip to a so-called ‘ghost town' in Tombstone, Arizona, USA.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: The Perplexing Parrot
programme.desc: When a lost parrot appears in Ayrton Park, Addison must find some way of returning it to its rightful owner by deciphering clues from the cryptic phrases that the errant bird utters.

programme.title: Oil Platform
programme.desc: A visit to an oil platform leads to an accident that Kit and Mr. Battery must set right.

programme.title: Tsunami
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery fight the albatross for the stolen safety buoys.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Is there a country where even toddlers happily eat the spiciest dishes? Our heroes travel to Thailand to find out. And Alim's penfriend Narawan prepares a spicy meal.

programme.title: Engaging Engineering
programme.desc: How do simple building elements create architecture? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of construction. Have hands-on fun by building your own tower, and get to know Fazlur Rahman Khan, who came up with the ‘tube' structure in skyscraper design.

programme.title: Ready Steady Go
programme.desc: Joe and Uncle Jack help Flo repaint her dinghy as Morris shows off. There's a race to Granny's between Flo and Joe's dinghies. Joe's boat is ahead when Morris falls overboard. He is rescued. Flo's dinghy wins the race. For once Ebb has outshone Morris!

programme.title: Oil Platform
programme.desc: A visit to an oil platform leads to an accident that Kit and Mr. Battery must set right.

programme.title: Tsunami
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery fight the albatross for the stolen safety buoys.

programme.title: Operation Ouch! Does Space
programme.desc: Blast off! Dr. Chris boards a weightless flight, and Dr. Xand meets an astronaut to explore what happens to the human body in space. How do you sneeze, poo, and wee in zero gravity?

programme.title: Soapy Sailing
programme.desc: Eric makes a model boat using soap as fuel. The boat moves because the soap breaks the surface tension of the water, causing the water molecules to repel each other and push each other backwards into the boat.

programme.title: Ghost Hunting
programme.desc: When Mundi is startled by Fico's prank, she insists she isn't afraid of ghosts. They don't even exist! Oto and Anabella definitely believe in ghosts. Mundi vows to prove they don't, with a trip to a so-called ‘ghost town' in Tombstone, Arizona, USA.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.desc: An Indian adaptation of the acclaimed international series 'Shameless'. The plot centers around Anvita, the eldest sister, who looks after her five siblings as her father struggles with alcoholism.

programme.title: E12 - Collard Green Dumplings & Apple Pie Potstickers
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: E19 - Appetite For Adventure
programme.desc: If you're hungry for excitement, this episode will certainly satisfy the most ravenous appetite for adventure. Join host Michael Yo for a wild desert horse-ride to a delicious dinner.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The Earth-Cleaning Bros' second mission: planting trees in the Elsen Tasarkhai desert! Led by self-proclaimed Mongolian expert Shaun, they set out with just one GPS coordinate.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: After over a year of hard work, the time has come to wrap up the epic project. The four directors and the master eagerly rush to see the completed stores as the dramatic grand reveal begins.

programme.title: E86 - Dallas: Glenhill
programme.desc: In an ideal neighborhood, a ramshackle bungalow with some vandalism and a faulty foundation falls in Derek and Chauncey's laps. A friend of theirs needs help with a flip and only has two weeks.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: The Ingredient gamble is back and so is Luke Nguyen. Luke has brought in an array of South East Asian ingredients our contestants get to cook with in today's two round elimination challenge.

programme.title: E72 - Dallas: Beechmont
programme.desc: Derek and Chauncey buy a bug infested zombie with high hopes of turning it around. But when they encounter plumbing problems and an actual burglary, will their high hopes of a profitable flip be smashed?

programme.title: E40 - Chili For Maria
programme.desc: Rachael turns on the heat and shows how to prepare her sister's favourite meal, a chilli recipe made with black beans, chopped meat, spices and topped with a blend of cheeses.

programme.desc: Lau Pa Sat Satay Street, the Singapore version of Euljiro's beer alley: from skewers and beer to a variety of international cuisines, this place has it all. And of course the penalty game is a must!

programme.title: I Juander
programme.desc: A magazine program that delves deep into different aspects of Filipino culture to gain better understanding of traditions, folklore, cuisine, and also demystifying old beliefs and mysteries.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Witness a shark competition unlike any other, where great whites go head-to-head in jaw-dropping tests of strength. Risk it all with shark specialist Dr. Riley Elliott as he tries to answer an age-old question: Which sex reigns supreme?

programme.title: E1 - Florida
programme.desc: Florida is famous for its sandy shores—and there’s plenty to go around. Florida has the most tidal shoreline of any state in the continental USA. These ocean-side playgrounds are also critical habitats for threatened and endangered species.

programme.title: E4 - Ice
programme.desc: Trek to the planet’s quickly melting poles, where animals are giving scientists clues about our future existence. Learn how the movements of polar bears, penguins, and other arctic creatures could help humans map (and prevent) global warming.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Witness a shark competition unlike any other, where great whites go head-to-head in jaw-dropping tests of strength. Risk it all with shark specialist Dr. Riley Elliott as he tries to answer an age-old question: Which sex reigns supreme?

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Witness a shark competition unlike any other, where great whites go head-to-head in jaw-dropping tests of strength. Risk it all with shark specialist Dr. Riley Elliott as he tries to answer an age-old question: Which sex reigns supreme?

programme.title: E2 - Mum's the Word
programme.desc: Get to know Fera, the Queen of the Pantanal, as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba how to climb trees and hunt for dinner. Then learn why Ferinha, another local female, struggles with motherhood as more males move in and threaten the youngsters.

programme.title: E3 - The Sandveld: Land of Contrasts
programme.desc: A narrow and harsh belt of western coastline in southern Africa is a land of contrasts where creatures are forced to adapt to survive. Meet the quirky and charismatic inhabitants that call this fragile interplay between land and ocean home.

programme.title: E4 - Namaqualand: the Desert Bloom
programme.desc: For most of the year it’s a desert, but during early August and September the dusty valleys of Namaqualand transform into a wonderland carpeted with wildflowers. Witness this magnificent transformation from arid desert to beautiful oasis.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Witness a shark competition unlike any other, where great whites go head-to-head in jaw-dropping tests of strength. Risk it all with shark specialist Dr. Riley Elliott as he tries to answer an age-old question: Which sex reigns supreme?

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E3 - The Sandveld: Land of Contrasts
programme.desc: A narrow and harsh belt of western coastline in southern Africa is a land of contrasts where creatures are forced to adapt to survive. Meet the quirky and charismatic inhabitants that call this fragile interplay between land and ocean home.

programme.title: E4 - Namaqualand: the Desert Bloom
programme.desc: For most of the year it’s a desert, but during early August and September the dusty valleys of Namaqualand transform into a wonderland carpeted with wildflowers. Witness this magnificent transformation from arid desert to beautiful oasis.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: E2 - Mum's the Word
programme.desc: Get to know Fera, the Queen of the Pantanal, as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba how to climb trees and hunt for dinner. Then learn why Ferinha, another local female, struggles with motherhood as more males move in and threaten the youngsters.

programme.title: E3 - The Sandveld: Land of Contrasts
programme.desc: A narrow and harsh belt of western coastline in southern Africa is a land of contrasts where creatures are forced to adapt to survive. Meet the quirky and charismatic inhabitants that call this fragile interplay between land and ocean home.

programme.title: E4 - Namaqualand: the Desert Bloom

programme.title: Boss Shark: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: Witness a shark competition unlike any other, where great whites go head-to-head in jaw-dropping tests of strength. Risk it all with shark specialist Dr. Riley Elliott as he tries to answer an age-old question: Which sex reigns supreme?

programme.title: Hum Do Humare Do
programme.desc: An orphan man's life takes a hilarious turn when he decides to hire a duo, who share a past, to fake being his parents in an attempt to fulfil his lover's wish of marrying someone with a family. Release Year: 2021 Director: Abhishek Jain

programme.title: Rakshak
programme.desc: Demeaned all his life, Raghu decides to teach the world a lesson by printing the best ever fake currency notes. Release Year: 1996 Director: Ashok Honda

programme.title: Samrat Prithviraj
programme.desc: A fearless warrior. An epic love story. Witness the grand saga of Samrat Prithviraj Chauhan. Release Year: 2022 Director: Chandraprakash Dwivedi Awards: 2022 WinnerFilm Award, 2022 WinnerFilmfare Award, 2023 WinnerPopular Award- Debut of The Year- Manushi Chhillar

programme.title: Bhoothnath
programme.desc: Moving into a new house, a family witnesses an unfriendly ghost who wants to drive them away from the house. However, he befriends a little boy who changes his outlook forever. Release Year: 2008 Director: Vivek Sharma Awards: Screen Awards- Best Special Effects- Biju Dhanpalan

programme.title: Mission Mangal
programme.desc: Based on an extraordinary true story of India's finest scientists who rose above all the hardships and failures to make India the only country to reach Mars in its first attempt. Release Year: 2019 Director: Jagan Shakti

programme.title: Ek Villain
programme.desc: When his lover becomes the latest victim of a serial killer, Guru blurs the line between good and evil in his pursuit of revenge. Release Year: 2014 Director: Mohit Suri Awards: BIG Star Entertainment Awards - Most Entertaining Thriller Film winner

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. programme.title: 64' Debat:2025-2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: E32 - Delphine Boulay Case: Terror At The Scout Camp
programme.desc: August 1988. Delphine, 9 years old, leaves with her brother for a scout camp near Deauville. Holidays that will quickly turn into a nightmare. One night, while she was supposed to be sleeping peacefully in her tent, Delphine disappeared. Her lifeless body would be found a few days later.

programme.title: E4 - Changes In Attitudes
programme.desc: While farming has been seen positively by the majority of the population for a long time, changes in attitudes, especially relating to animal well-being, have altered how people view farming methods.

programme.title: E26 - The Umbrella
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: E4 - Here's A Reindeer
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: E102 - Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find 'the big picture' as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: E201 - The Max of Life
programme.desc: Missing fame and fans, Max decides to recapture some glory by breaking Booch's sandwich-stacking record at Splat by the Sea, but Chloe challenges him so that her friend can have her record back.

programme.title: E218 - Minyak Attack
programme.desc: When a tax loophole allows Dr. Minyak to buy the Man's Nest, Captain Man must stand his ground and live with his terrible new roommate while Danger Force tries to find a way to reverse the sale before they lose the Man's Nest for good.

programme.title: E218 - iReunite With Missy
programme.desc: When Carly’s old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly’s best friend.

programme.title: E123 - #MagicATM
programme.desc: Sam notices that Cat has been spending lots of money. When she asks where it's coming from, Cat takes Sam to a 'Magic ATM' that gives her free money. Sam worries that this might not be legal.

programme.title: E277 - Captain Pipsqueak/Plane to Sea
programme.desc: Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L. // SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.title: E202 - Super Stars / Now Museum, Now You Don't
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, the Star family is a team of superheroes, or at least they think they are. // Cecil works a new temp job as a security guard at Lady Upturn's art museum.

programme.title: E260 - Knock Knock, Who's There? / Pat Hearts Squid
programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs's house while he's away, so he takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in. // Squidward is forced to room with Patrick, but his domineering demeanor rubs off on Patrick more than he'd like.

programme.title: E207 - Mimic Madness
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns that 'imitation is the sincerest form of flattery' - too bad no one told him how to stop!

programme.title: E322 - Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change it up. // When Lori finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play, she develops the yips.

programme.title: E305 - The Dirty Bubble Bass / Sheldon SquarePants
programme.desc: Bubble Bass and the Dirty Bubble team up to become Bikini Bottom's nastiest nefarious nuisance. // Plankton joins the SquarePants family in the hope of becoming closer to SpongeBob (and the secret formula).

programme.title: E305 - Driven to Drive / A Patty in Time
programme.desc: In a Patrick Show episode about boats, Cecil teaches Patrick how to drive. // Patrick time-travels in a race for the Krusty Krab's newest menu item.

programme.title: E206 - Unreal Estate / Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. // Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

E13 - Holy Macau!
programme.desc: The final five chefs travel to the Chinese territory of Macau for the remaining battles of the competition. Judge Graham Elliot, who has a restaurant in Macau, introduces the Chefs to the local market full of fascinating ingredients and challenges them to a Quickfire highlighting unique Macanese proteins. Then, the chefs throw a party celebrating Chinese New Year. Since it is the Year of the Pig, the dishes must feature pork products and be delicious enough to impress Hong Kong’s super chef Jowett Yu along with Tom, Padma and Graham.

E1
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: HK Stylized Thriller: Missing
programme.desc: In 2005, a high-profile case of a police officer who disappeared during a forest hike spawned urban legends about the existence of a gateway into another world. In 2016, those legends inspired popular internet novel Missing, which is now being adapted into an eerie supernatural thriller by first-time director and Fresh Wave alum Ronnie Chau. Former pop idol Gillian Chung stars as a social worker who hires a mountain guide to search for her missing father in the mountains. She discovers the mystical gateway from the urban legends, but is her father really waiting for her on the other side?

programme.title: Hand Rolled Cigarette
programme.desc: Former Hong Kong Military Service Corps officer becomes caught in a triad manhunt when he takes in an ethnic South Asian man carrying a bag of stolen drugs. Forced to live under the same roof, the two men transcend their cultural and racial differences to form a beautiful friendship in this poignant tale of loyalty and brotherhood.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E277 -Cold War
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: The Third Eye
programme.desc: Zhang Liang is a young man who does not engage into any proper work. His secret hobby is to play with all kinds of high-tech candid technology, especially the candid photographs. He likes to upload the photographs on the Internet to share his homepage with others. Within his beloved masterpiece, he specially falls madly in love on a young air-stewardess. One day, Zhang Liang follows the young lady Amy from the airport to Tai O. In order to catch more splendid segments, Liang brings his full equipment all the way to stay in a vacation house - Mei King Village and becomes a neighbour of Amy...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E277 -Cold War
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: E3 - A Day with JJ: Morning & Night!
programme.desc: Spend a whole day with JJ, from morning to night! Wake up & get ready with the family as JJ learns his morning routine. Then, it's off to a big adventure: JJ's first day of preschool! He's a little nervous, but he makes new friends & has lots of fun. After a full day of playing, it's time to get ready for bed. Mommy guides JJ through his nighttime routine of brushing his teeth, taking a bath & reading a story before he drifts off to sleep.

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E3 - Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Join Blippi for some fun nature discoveries! First, he & D.BO dive to the ocean floor to help a forgetful island remember why it doesn't float away. Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E1 - What Makes Our Family So Special!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns what makes his family so special! First, he recounts all the wonderful things about his big sister Jill, from the way they splash in the bathtub to how she takes care of him when he gets a boo boo. Then, he's not interested in spending the day with grandpa, until he sees his vintage motorbike! Together they use their imaginations to take the motorbike through fantastical lands. It's a day of learning how special family is!

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - What Makes Our Family So Special!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns what makes his family so special! E5 - Don’t Look Down
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: E8 - Zagreb
programme.desc: Jack travels to landlocked Zagreb in Croatia to cook fish and chips for hungry locals and a politician. Will they like his version of the internationally renowned meal?

programme.title: E9 - Heavy Lifting
programme.desc: Moving a massive jade slab tests the mine’s old equipment and Josh’s patience.

programme.title: E10 - Panic Mode
programme.desc: Hauling a 20-tonne boulder on the treacherous road out of the mine proves too much for their old truck 6-Pack.

programme.title: E5 - Highlights 5
programme.desc: In the penultimate stretch of their journey, the four remaining celebrities must find and eat the fruits of the forest, carefully separating nutritious treats from any potentially deadly dinners. After that, they endure another stormy night and face their most extreme challenge yet - crossing a 200ft ravine one by one on a rope. Bear also tests their ability to start a fire using only bamboo poles, knives and flints, before deciding which three he will take through to the Bear Grylls: Mission Survive final.

programme.title: E5 - Highlights 5
programme.desc: In the penultimate stretch of their journey, the four remaining celebrities must find and eat the fruits of the forest, carefully separating nutritious treats from any potentially deadly dinners. After that, they endure another stormy night and face their most extreme challenge yet - crossing a 200ft ravine one by one on a rope. Bear also tests their ability to start a fire using only bamboo poles, knives and flints, before deciding which three he will take through to the Bear Grylls: Mission Survive final.

programme.title: E9 - Heavy Lifting
programme.desc: Moving a massive jade slab tests the mine’s old equipment and Josh’s patience.

programme.title: E10 - Panic Mode
programme.desc: Hauling a 20-tonne boulder on the treacherous road out of the mine proves too much for their old truck 6-Pack.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: 92' The Legendary La Rose Noire
programme.desc: As soon as Tony Leung, starts imitating the stilted dialogue of 60s heartthrob Lui Kei, film lovers know they've entered a circle of movie-in-jokes and self-conscious world.

programme.title: Lavender
programme.desc: Athena is an aromatherapy tutor but can't heal up her wound at heart. One day, she finds a broken-wing angel falling on balcony. A scented romance is gradually in between them...

programme.title: Hitman
programme.desc: With a box of worthless war bonds, an old man hired the King of Killers to assassinate a Japanese trade lord. In WWII, the trade lord's action had caused grave damage to the family of the King of Killers. He agrees to take the job and delivers in a few days. The Revenge Fund set up by the trade lord kicks in. Whoever avenges the trade lord's death, killing the killer and the force behind him, will receive a reward of $1 billion. The police assigns Inspector to watch the killers, with orders to leave them room when they kill each other. Among the killers vying for the reward are Fu, a new immigrant, and his agent, Wong a longtime loser trying to score a big one riding on Fu's coat-tail. After an elaborately orchestrated chain of events, Wong and Fu manage to accomplish their goal.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.desc: It is difficult not to be touched by the complicity between Rene and Maxime, father and son, who have converted their modest family inn into a must gastronomic stop-off point in the heart of the Trois Vallees. And what could be more natural, when your name is Meilleur, than to set out to conquer Michelin stars?

programme.title: E5 - A Step Away From Infinity
programme.desc: The Cistercian monks of the Hauterive Abbey open their doors. In this haven of tranquillity dating back nine hundred years, they cultivate the land as they do the spirit.

programme.title: E5 - A Step Away From Infinity

programme.title: E16 - The Maritime Saga Of The Barreau Brothers
programme.desc: The 'Grain de Sail' is a one-of-a-kind cargo sailboat. From Saint-Malo to New York, it transports 50 tons of wine, coffee and chocolate. Jacques and Olivier Barreau are behind this initiative and have chosen carbon-neutral maritime transport, all by the force of the wind.

programme.title: E16 - Lucille Boitelle/Gabriela Hearst/Mathieu Casseau
programme.desc: In the heart of Lyon, the Musee des Beaux-Arts houses 90,000 works of art. Lucille Boitelle is an ornamental painter who creates worlds that embellish any surface. Sensual and ethereal: the show by Uruguayan designer Gabriela Hearst. In Douarnenez, ceramist Mathieu Casseau handles clay with vigour and gentleness.

programme.title: E46
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E12 - 體驗古法制作工藝
programme.desc: 世界遺產探訪紀實文化類節目，由單霽翔、周韻、肖央、牛駿峰擔任「世遺守護人」，通過與當地的人文學者、申遺專家等進行交流，揭秘中國世界遺產背後的故事，呈現中國世界文化遺產的新奇觀、新地標、新景象、新人文。

programme.title: E1 - 旅行前的準備
programme.desc: 以寵物為主角，萌寵們在「鏟屎官」的帶領下，前往上海、大理、深圳三座城市，從城市到田園，從森林到海邊，讓觀眾看到人寵相伴的多樣出行方式，了解到流浪動物的救助計劃，以及探索人與寵物的和諧相處的新方法。

programme.title: E4 - 黃曉明被「貼心小棉襖」感動落淚
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.
